commit_scope: Add direct Wi-Fi transport instrumentation for the Mac + Android core-axiom receipt helper and record the observed non-adb transport blocker without moving the floor.

commands: python3 -m http.server <port> --bind 0.0.0.0; adb shell "ip route; toybox nc ..."
local_validation.notes: The helper now accepts a third transport argument: adb-forward-tcp or wifi-tcp. The wifi-tcp mode starts a Mac native listener, waits for a readiness marker written after listen(2), rejects a selected Mac address that equals Android wlan0, and launches the Android native client under /system/bin/timeout 8 with adb used only for provisioning/launch. The live wifi-tcp proof did not pass: an early run reported connect refused to host=192.168.0.7 while diagnostics showed Mac en0 and Android wlan0 both using IPv4 192.168.0.7, so the Android client was connecting to itself; after Android moved to 192.168.0.4, the bounded wifi-tcp run returned rc=124 timeout to Mac host=192.168.0.7. A separate IPv6 link-local probe from Android to Mac fe80::85a:e20c:f469:86e3%wlan0 timed out. The existing adb-forward-tcp package receipt still passed on SM-S918U1 Android 16 arm64-v8a with script_sha256=7abc13ef19ef35f15c663cd419109e2a93e7054811ac2362a796a17dad1f9249, 2048 width-8 samples, checksum 8613732184965110171, channel_duration_ms=284, and remote_cleanup=pass.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

deploy_validation.summary: No public deploy requested; this is local Mac + authorized Android transport instrumentation and blocker evidence.

phase_gate.gate: Non-adb Mac+Android native transport must produce a passing receipt before the physical floor widens beyond adb-forward.
phase_gate.next: Fix peer addressing so Mac and Android have distinct reachable LAN addresses, or choose another native carrier such as BLE/RFCOMM, Wi-Fi Direct, audio, or USB accessory, then rerun scripts/android_mac_core_axiom_receipt.sh 2048 8 wifi-tcp or the matching carrier proof.

floor_update.previous_observed_floor: core-axiom-native-receipt and core-axiom-package-receipt prove Mac+Android native receipt/package evidence over adb-forward-tcp.
floor_update.current_observed_floor: Unchanged: adb-forward-tcp remains the passing Mac+Android native receipt/package carrier. wifi-tcp is instrumented but blocked by duplicate-address and direct-reachability timeout evidence.
